title: GMS Week 16 - CEASEFIRE EXTENDED, NOT RESOLVED
section_path: GMS Week 16 - CEASEFIRE EXTENDED, NOT RESOLVED
section_path_text: GMS Week 16 - CEASEFIRE EXTENDED, NOT RESOLVED
summary:
Main
The Week 15 thesis that the war premium was cracking has not held.What looked like a diplomatic off-ramp has narrowed into a less convincing outcome. Washington and Tehran are considering a two-week ceasefire extension, but talks are now focused on a temporary memorandum to avoid renewed conflict, not the broader agreement and Hormuz reopening markets had priced in. has imposed a naval blockade on Iranian ports, while Tehran continues to restrict the Strait of Hormuz to non-Iranian traffic.
